definition.title: API Schema Generator
definition.description: Generate a JSON API schema from a natural language description.

inputs.name: api_description
inputs.description: Description of the API endpoints and data models

steps.title: Parse Requirements
Generate Schema
steps.content:
Generate a complete OpenAPI 3.0 JSON schema for API version {{version}} based on the parsed requirements.

Include:
- All endpoint definitions
- Request and response schemas
- Validation constraints
- Example values for each field

Output valid JSON only.
